[CM Arcie Live Stream #15]

The Dress Party must indeed go on! …Wait, who’s CM A.R.C.I.E?
Be sure to tune in tomorrow to find out…!

🗓️Date & Time: 8/22 (Thu) 0:00 AM (UTC)
